# Morrison Evidence Folder — File Manifest
# Centrifugal Blood Pump Hemolysis CFD Study
# Morrison et al. (2019), DOI: 10.1115/1.4043024
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# This folder contains the evidence artifacts for the V&V 40
# credibility assessment of two Contexts of Use (COU1: CPB, COU2: VAD).
# It is intended for use with `uofa extract` to demonstrate the
# extract → import → sign pipeline.
#
# FILE LISTING:
#
# PDFs (3):
#   risk_assessment_memo.pdf         Model risk assessment for COU1 and COU2
#   decision_rationale_cou1.pdf      Acceptance decision record (COU1: ACCEPTED)
#   decision_rationale_cou2.pdf      Non-acceptance decision record (COU2: NOT ACCEPTED)
#
# CSVs (4):
#   mesh_convergence_study.csv       Grid convergence data (4 mesh levels, GCI)
#   piv_velocity_validation.csv      PIV vs CFD centerline velocity (17 stations)
#   hemolysis_mih_comparison.csv     MIH values across 7 configurations
#   monte_carlo_uq_cou2.csv          200-sample MC propagation (COU2 only)
#
# Config/Text (2):
#   ansys_cfx_solver_settings.txt    ANSYS CFX solver configuration
#   boundary_conditions_specification.txt  Operating conditions + tolerance study
#
# Word Documents (2):
#   cou_definitions.docx             Context of Use definitions (COU1 + COU2)
#   credibility_assessment_narrative.docx  13-factor V&V 40 assessment narrative
#
# Total: 11 evidence files + this manifest
#
# USAGE:
#   uofa extract morrison-evidence/ --pack vv40
#   [review generated Excel]
#   uofa import morrison-evidence-reviewed.xlsx
#   uofa sign uofa-morrison.jsonld --key keys/research.key
#   uofa check uofa-morrison.jsonld
